Comment: Ola is without question one of the best Professors at the Miami Business. Ola comes from teaching at some of the top european business schools in the world, and is considered one of the most significant scholars in Blockchain technology. If you have a chance to take any of his classes do it - worth every penny, super fair, and inspirational!!!!!!
I would never take this professor again. Can barely understand the professor, not very eloquent, not thought provoking, in ability to make the material interesting.

Professor Ola was a good professor for BTE 210. The group project was the course's main grade source which was fun to do but was tedious. He understands that not everyone knows a lot about computer systems and takes that into account when lecturing. Overall, he is a good professor and is open to talking about any questions you have.

Comment: I was shocked to see he had such a low score, I was a big fan of him all semester.

Professor Ola is a nice person. But his class is boring and difficult to follow. I did not learn much from his class. The tests are usually 30 min and 30 MCs and you cannot go back after answering each question. It is pretty hard to get a good grade from the tests unless you are very confident of the materials.
Confounds himself all the time going back and forward like a car stuck in the mud, I'm more confused now on what BTE is than I was before this class.
Simply the most boring prof I ever had in my entire life, just a waste of time.
